description: RBI Monetary Policy Committee raises the repo rate and reprices rate-sensitive sectors.

required_inputs.label: Current repo rate (%) before the hike
Was this an off-cycle / emergency move?

situation_template: The Reserve Bank of India has {off_cycle_text}raised the repo rate by {hike_magnitude_bps} basis points to {new_rate}%. CPI inflation is at {current_inflation_percent}%, {inflation_band_comment}. {surprise_text}Sensex has moved {sensex_immediate_move} points in a {market_shock_label}. The rupee {rupee_direction}.
round_events: Round 1 (0-2 hours): Analysts react to the policy surprise, banking and NBFC names see immediate repricing, and RBI commentary starts shaping expectations.
Round 2 (2-12 hours): Bond yields adjust by roughly {bond_yield_estimate} basis points, fund managers reassess rate-sensitive sectors, and loan/EMI discussions dominate headlines.
Round 3 (12-72 hours): Finance Ministry tone, broker notes, and second-order effects on capex, housing demand, and consumption become clearer.
